name: Adept of the Black Robes
description: You learn one 2nd-level enchantment or necromancy spell and can cast it once per long rest without a spell slot, or using your own spell slots. Additionally, when a creature within 60 feet fails a saving throw against a damaging spell you cast, you can expend Hit Dice equal to the spell's level to increase the damage by the total rolled on those Hit Dice.
